weekday.name: Weekday daytime
weekday.description: Relaxed pace, with long inter-arrival times and moderate load on staff and cats.

holiday-rush.name: Holiday rush
holiday-rush.description: Crowded peak hours with impatient customers and heavy resource contention.

cat-nap.name: Cat nap mode
cat-nap.description: Cats frequently rest, creating an interaction-resource bottleneck for demonstration.

hirsch-paper.name: Paper sample (Hirsch 2025)
hirsch-paper.description: Mirrors Hirsch et al. (2025)'s Stockholm cat café setup: 27 cats, 12 operating hours, warm-up included. Sample size large enough for the validation score to stabilise above 80.
